entries.sourceText:
sequenceDiagram
    participant User as Ty
    participant Harness as Harness
    participant Model as Model
    participant Tool as Terminal / pliki

    User->>Harness: Opis celu i ograniczeń
    Harness->>Model: Kontekst zadania
    Model->>Harness: Prośba o tool call
    Harness->>Tool: Uruchomienie komendy lub odczyt pliku
    Tool-->>Harness: Wynik działania
    Harness-->>Model: tool_result w kontekście
    Model-->>Harness: Kolejny krok albo odpowiedź
    Harness-->>User: Zmiana, diff lub podsumowanie
entries.translatedText:
sequenceDiagram
    participant User as You
    participant Harness as Harness
    participant Model as Model
    participant Tool as Terminal / files

    User->>Harness: Description of goal and constraints
    Harness->>Model: Task context
    Model->>Harness: Request for tool call
    Harness->>Tool: Execute command or read file
    Tool-->>Harness: Execution result
    Harness-->>Model: tool_result in context
    Model-->>Harness: Next step or response
    Harness-->>User: Change, diff, or summary

entries.sourceText:
flowchart LR
    C1[Prompt tekstowy] --> C2[Model]
    C2 --> C3[Odpowiedź tekstowa]
    C3 --> C4[Ręczne kopiowanie, testy i integracja]

entries.translatedText:
flowchart LR
    C1[Text prompt] --> C2[Model]
    C2 --> C3[Text response]
    C3 --> C4[Manual copying, testing, and integration]

entries.sourceText:
flowchart LR
    A1[Cel, ograniczenia i kryteria sukcesu] --> H1[Harness]
    H1 --> A2[Model]
    A2 -->|tool_call| H2[Kontrola uprawnień]
    H2 --> T1[Narzędzia: pliki, CLI, API, testy]
    T1 -->|tool_result| H3[Kontekst i historia pracy]
    H3 --> A2
    A2 --> A3[Plan, zmiana lub pytanie]
    A3 --> H4[Diff, logi i podsumowanie]
    H4 --> A4[Review użytkownika]
entries.translatedText:
flowchart LR
    A1[Goal, constraints, and success criteria] --> H1[Harness]
    H1 --> A2[Model]
    A2 -->|tool_call| H2[Permissions check]
    H2 --> T1[Tools: files, CLI, API, tests]
    T1 -->|tool_result| H3[Context and work history]
    H3 --> A2
    A2 --> A3[Plan, change, or question]
    A3 --> H4[Diff, logs, and summary]
    H4 --> A4[User review]
